implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Baseline captured before each task invocation
Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes
First task reports correct file counts
Logging shows baseline vs delta counts

completion_promises.criterion_text: Baseline captured before each task invocation (both task-work and direct paths)
completion_promises.evidence: Added _task_baseline_state instance variable and _snapshot_worktree_state() method. invoke_player() calls _snapshot_worktree_state() before each task invocation to capture baseline state. Verified by unit test TestInvokePlayerBaselineCapture.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Git-detected file counts reflect only per-task changes, not cumulative feature changes
completion_promises.evidence: Both _create_player_report_from_task_work and _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report now compute delta by subtracting baseline state from current git state. Verified by unit tests TestPlayerReportFromTaskWorkDelta and TestSyntheticDirectModeDelta.
Replaced union merge (original_modified | git_modified) with delta computation (git_modified - baseline_modified). Verified by TestPlayerReportFromTaskWorkDelta::test_report_uses_delta_not_union.

completion_promises.criterion_text: _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report uses delta instead of raw git state
completion_promises.evidence: Replaced direct use of git_changes with delta computation (git_modified - baseline_modified). Verified by TestSyntheticDirectModeDelta::test_synthetic_report_uses_delta.

completion_promises.criterion_text: First task in worktree still reports correct file counts
completion_promises.evidence: When _task_baseline_state is empty (first task), delta = current git state, so all files are reported correctly. Verified by TestPlayerReportFromTaskWorkDelta::test_first_task_reports_all_files and TestSyntheticDirectModeDelta::test_synthetic_report_first_task_all_files.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests verify delta computation with mock git state
completion_promises.evidence: Created 13 unit tests in tests/unit/test_git_baseline_delta.py covering: _snapshot_worktree_state (3 tests), invoke_player baseline capture (2 tests), delta computation logic (4 tests), _create_player_report_from_task_work delta (2 tests), _create_synthetic_direct_mode_report delta (2 tests). All 13 tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Logging shows baseline vs delta counts for observability
completion_promises.evidence: Added logger.info call in _create_player_report_from_task_work that logs: f'Git detection for {task_id}: baseline={baseline_mod_count}+{baseline_cre_count}, delta={delta_mod_count}+{delta_cre_count}'. Also logs baseline capture in invoke_player: f'Captured per-task baseline for {task_id}: {len(baseline_modified)} modified, {len(baseline_created)} created'.
